mapper.select: SELECT * FROM silicone_glow_ink_product ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM silicone_glow_ink_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE silicone_glow_ink_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, `usage` = #{usage}, category = #{category}, color = #{color}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_sheet_size = #{minSheetSize}, max_sheet_size = #{maxSheetSize}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, max_spacing = #{maxSpacing}, design_info = #{designInfo}, applicable_interface = #{applicableInterface}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM silicone_glow_ink_compatibility WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM silicone_glow_ink_compatibility ORDER BY product_id ASC, display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM silicone_glow_ink_compatibility WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO silicone_glow_ink_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO silicone_glow_ink_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM silicone_glow_ink_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC
